notes: High-density modular RAC installed in Bay 5000 MSX chassis; targeted at service providers, telcos, carriers, large enterprises. Featured BayDSP modem technology.

tech_name: Bay Networks Model 8000 Remote Access Concentrator
notes: Stand-alone RAC targeted at smaller ISPs and enterprise users; also features BayDSP modem technology from Penril acquisition.
Digital Signal Processing-based modem technology acquired via Penril Datability Networks; enabled 56K modem capabilities.
Competing standards x2 (3Com/US Robotics) and K56flex (Rockwell) were unified by ITU V.90 standard ratified September 1998. All dial-up modem tech obsolete post-broadband.
Modular chassis in which 5399 RAC installs; part of Bay's multi-service access product family.
